subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Be thou happy, for the cloud of mercy hath showered eternal bounties upon the gardens of heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی خوش باش که ابر رحمت بر ریاض جان و دل فیض ابدی مبذول داشت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
